{{Infobox character
| name = Tyril
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[High Councilor]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|, High Shepherd}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|fighter}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

''See also: [[Tyril Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Tyril is one of the three [[High Councilors]] and holds the title of High [[Shepherd]]. Originally from the [[Shepherds]], he possesses a physical appearance characterized by a long, unkempt gray beard and a thin frame. In his earlier appearances, he often wore dark rags and appeared exhausted, frequently sleeping in public settings. However, he is also capable of presenting himself with great vigor and formality, wearing fine black clothing when performing official duties. As a member of the [[High Council]], he works alongside [[Kerian]] and represents the interests of the [[Consultant's Guild]]. In his political capacity, he has expressed support for any of the [[Regents]] ascending to the throne of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]] or [[Empress]].}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|As the third and final [[High Councilor]], Tyril is a figure of significant political standing. He is known to produce a blade that resembles a short [[sword]] and functions as a fighter utilizing a knife. During one instance, he was observed leaning against a wall while catching his breath. Later, he was seen napping in his chair.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tyril]] is a [[High Councilor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tyril]] produces a blade that resembles a short [[sword]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tyril]] is a fighter using a knife.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tyril]] was leaning against a wall catching his breath.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tyril]] is the third and final [[High Councilor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tyril]] was napping in his chair.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tyril]] wore black without a shroud over his face.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tyril]] is the High [[Shepherd]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tyril]] physically dragged [[Yala]] off.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
